name: solana_token_safety_check
description: Check if a Solana SPL token is safe to trade. Analyzes mint authority, freeze authority, LP lock status, top holder concentration, metadata mutability, and token age. Returns a composite risk score 0-100 and per-check risk assessments. Accepts any Solana token mint address. Useful before buying, swapping, or providing liquidity to any Solana token.

mint_address.description: Solana token mint address in base58 format
